markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the content review process and approve new article topics.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Review Process:** A GitHub PR workflow is approved for new articles, replacing the issue-based system. This makes the review process more transparent and directly integrates with the website's publishing pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [**Topic Backlog Cleared:** \~20 article topics were approved in Airtable, providing sufficient content for GrowthX to draft through the end of the year and into January.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [**Competitive Content Strategy:** Comparison articles (e.g., "Jamf vs. NinjaOne vs. Fleet") will be created to capture competitor-specific search traffic. These will undergo high-scrutiny review to ensure fairness and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - [**"MDM Handbook" Project:** A new, open-source-style "MDM Handbook" is planned to establish Fleet as a community authority. It will serve as a call-to-action for the upcoming MacAdmin podcast sponsorship.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2768.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The current issue-based review process is opaque and lacks a clear publishing trigger.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Solution:** A GitHub PR workflow for new articles was approved.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
        1.  [**Draft:** GrowthX creates a new branch and PR.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
        2.  [**Review:** Marketing assigns a reviewer (from Dale's or Alan's team).](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
        3.  [**Refine:** GrowthX and the reviewer iterate on feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
        4.  [**Publish:** An approved PR is merged, triggering automatic publication.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [**Feedback Loop:** Reviewer feedback will be used to update GrowthX's "Atlas" tool (company context, personas, guidelines) to improve future drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [**Potential Bottleneck:** The 3-week sprint cycle for reviewers could create a backlog if GrowthX's 5 articles/week cadence is maintained. This will be monitored.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Approval Authority:** John will ask Mike T if a dedicated "tone review" step is needed. Mike T previously indicated anyone can approve PRs, but John will seek formal clarification.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Article Topic Backlog Review

  - [**Goal:** Clear the Airtable backlog to ensure a steady pipeline of approved topics.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**MDM Fundamentals:** Several educational topics were approved to build topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
      - [**Approved:** Zero-touch deployment, device lifecycle, BYOD.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
      - [**Archived:** EMM/MAM (outdated), "MDM security" (too broad).](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [**Solution Evaluation & Alternatives:** Competitive comparison articles were approved to capture specific search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
      - [**Approved:** "15 best MDM providers," "Jamf alternative," "Jamf vs. NinjaOne," "Best MDM for Windows," "Best MDM for Mac."](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
      - [**Archived:** "Apple Business Essentials alternative" (not a direct competitor).](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)
  - [**Competitive Content Accuracy:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
      - [**Requirement:** These articles must be fair, honest, and avoid marketing fluff.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
      - [**Resource:** GrowthX will create a "Product Feature Matrix" artifact for these pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
      - [**Action:** Brock will request access to Fleet's internal competitive battle cards to provide to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [**Gartner Report Leverage:** Fleet will be mentioned favorably in Gartner's upcoming Endpoint Management Magic Quadrant (expected Jan 5).](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
      - [**Plan:** Scan the report for keywords and features to create articles that link back to the report, boosting SEO and credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)
  - [**"MDM Handbook" Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2836.0)
      - [**Vision:** A curated, open-source-style resource on MDM best practices, hosted at `fleet.com/mdm-handbook`.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2836.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish Fleet as a neutral, authoritative expert in the MDM space, similar to the existing Fleet Handbook.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2850.0)
      - [**Execution:** The handbook will be a curated project, not a GrowthX-driven initiative, to ensure quality and community contribution.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2949.0)
  - [**MacAdmin Podcast Sponsorship:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2768.0)
      - [**Plan:** Use the "MDM Handbook" as a call-to-action in podcast ads, inviting listeners to contribute to the community resource.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=3040.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Get Mike T's final approval on the PR workflow and tone review step.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [Brief Dale and Alan on the new review process.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Share the "MDM Handbook" issue with Brock.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2836.0)
  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
      - [Request access to internal competitive battle cards for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2687.0)
      - [Inform Suleiman of the new PR workflow and the 2-3 articles ready for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
      - [Begin drafting \~5 newly approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=2687.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [Monitor the reviewer queue to prevent a backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/GUBYu1Vuw-HG79LxrrLtzwHgYpYEqAnB?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
